hooks.template: This is why doing (insert action) makes you (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This is why paying suppliers by card makes you lose the order.

hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result).
hooks.text: Here's the exact dollar amount where your card stops paying suppliers.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner went to pay 15K. The card just said no.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: Smart business owners pay big factory orders without one card decline.

hooks.template: What (insert title) says vs what they mean.
hooks.text: What the card screen shows vs what the 12,000 wall means.
